name: governance
description: Security, permissions, approval gates, prompt-injection defenses, trading/finance governance, and audit rules for AI Council.

capabilities.title: Permission Check
capabilities.summary: Classify whether a requested Council action is allowed, restricted, approval-gated, or disallowed.

capabilities.title: Approval Gate
capabilities.summary: Create a structured approval request before high-impact actions are executed.

capabilities.title: Secrets Scan
capabilities.summary: Scan local text files for common secret patterns and produce a local report.

capabilities.title: Prompt Injection Check
capabilities.summary: Review user-provided or document-provided instructions for prompt-injection patterns.

capabilities.title: Trading + Finance Governance
capabilities.summary: Apply finance/trading boundaries: education only, no guarantees, risk-first, no personalized financial advice.

capabilities.title: Data Classification
capabilities.summary: Classify data sensitivity and decide local/cloud handling constraints.

capabilities.title: Tool Action Guard
capabilities.summary: Gate tool execution by impact, reversibility, data sensitivity, and user approval.

capabilities.title: Provider Governance
capabilities.summary: Select model/provider tiers while respecting privacy, cost, and task criticality.

capabilities.title: Audit Record
capabilities.summary: Write local governance audit records for decisions, approvals, refusals, and escalations.

capabilities.title: Release Governance
capabilities.summary: Run release-level safety checks before deployment, publishing, or production changes.

capabilities.title: Incident Escalation
capabilities.summary: Escalate serious security, privacy, finance, or destructive-action incidents.

capabilities.title: Human Review Gate
capabilities.summary: Force human review for irreversible, external, regulated, or materially risky actions.
